Sandbox.title: Sandbox
Sandbox.description: Mode of Datatrans payment gateway (test or real)

ReturnUrl.title: Return URL
ReturnUrl.description: URL to redirect after payment completion. Use {orderId} placeholder for the order ID

PaymentMode.title: Payment mode
PaymentMode.description: Select the payment mode: SecureFields (inline card form) or Lightbox (popup overlay)

LightboxPaymentMethods.title: Lightbox payment methods
LightboxPaymentMethods.description: Comma-separated list of payment method codes to display in Lightbox (e.g., VIS,ECA,PAP,TWI). Leave empty to show all available methods

LightboxAutoSettle.title: Lightbox auto-settle
LightboxAutoSettle.description: Automatically settle transactions after authorization when using Lightbox mode
